# dp-meetdata

Information model for the "meetdata" data product.

## Website

[https://Netbeheer-Nederland.github.io/dp-meetdata](https://Netbeheer-Nederland.github.io/dp-meetdata)

## Repository Structure

* [examples/](examples/) - example data
* [project/](project/) - project files (do not edit these)
* [src/](src/) - source files (edit these)
  * [dp_meetdata](src/dp_meetdata)
    * [schema](src/dp_meetdata/schema) -- LinkML schema
      (edit this)

## Developer Documentation

<details>
Use the `make` command to generate project artefacts:

* `make all`: make everything
* `make deploy`: deploys site
</details>
